before_market: Earlier this morning, you decided to go to the market to buy some supplies. It should have been a simple trip, but just as you wre heading home the kingdom's hero got into a battle with some devil. You are just a peasant, you should wait for the fight to end or you'll be killed.
before_bridge: You made it out of the market alive, avoiding the fire and destruction caused by the hero's battle. You make your way to the bridge not to far out of town that leads back home, but unfortunately the hero seems to be fighting another devil. You'll just have to wait for the fight to end again.
before_forestchokepoint: You safely made it across the gap despite the hero and devil destroying the bridge in their fight. You're almost home now, your house is just past the forest. Unfortunately, the hero is fighting another devil. Your luck seems to be incredibly unfortunate today. You'll just have to wait out yet another battle.
before_burninghearthrun: You made it through the forest. It is definitely going to burn down if someone doesn't sort out all that fire. Your house is just in front of you, but the hero is yet again fighting another devil. They seem to be getting closer to your house, hopefully things don't get too out of hand.
ending: You finally made it home, it was a long journey, but sadly it's destroyed now. Your journey back home was all for nothing. The hero just walked away without even noticing the damage he caused. He never noticed you, you were just some background character in the hero's grand adventure. You are not the main character.
